description:
🌿 Custom Shape Wooden Block – Personalized Photo Gift 🌿
Turn your favorite memories into a warm, timeless keepsake. Our custom wooden block is handcrafted from premium solid wood, making it a meaningful gift or beautiful home décor piece.
✨ Product Details
• Material: Premium 3-layer solid wood
• Thickness: 15mm total (3 layers × 5mm)
• Printing: Single-sided, vibrant and high-quality print
• Sizes: 4" | 5" | 6" | 8"
Perfect for desks, shelves, or heartfelt gifts 💛
